name: money-app
description: 记账APP - 轻量级个人记账工具

scripts.dev:electron: tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5200 electron dist-electron/main.js
scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev:vite" "sleep 3 && npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.pack:win: npm run build && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron-packager . 记账APP --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist-release --overwrite --ignore="release|dist-release|\.git|src|electron/.*\.ts|vite\.config\.ts|tsconfig.*|start-electron.*|CLAUDE\.md|electron-builder\.yml"
scripts.pack:mac: npm run build && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron-packager . 记账APP --platform=darwin --arch=x64 --out=dist-release --overwrite --ignore="release|dist-release|\.git|src|electron/.*\.ts|vite\.config\.ts|tsconfig.*|start-electron.*|CLAUDE\.md|electron-builder\.yml"
